Table of Contents

Interface ILocalCoordinateSystem

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the properties and methods for local coordinate systems.

[Guid("A9B109F2-6224-4420-ABA6-2848F8C161E9")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ILocalCoordinateSystem : ISpatialReference, ISpatialReferenceInfo
